review_title: Made in NZ, great for your business!
description: Designing a Rocketspark website for your business/service or brand is a no brainer, the system is very user friendly, and if you need help or advice it is easy to get.
author: Bron A.
pros: I love that this product was developed by, and for New Zealand businesses and service providers. The templates are designed to be beautiful and function seamlessly, they can easily be modified to fit your brand aesthetic.
cons: As always, businesses need to keep up with current trends. Rocketspark are very proactive with taking on board feedback from its customers to improve its service.

review_title: Rocketspark made it easy to build a beautiful, functional website for my business
description: I'm so happy with my rocketspark website. It has immediately elevated the online image of our business and being in the accommodation industry; our online presence and user experience is incredibly important. The product and the team made it very easy to build a beautiful functional website that does exactly what it needs to.
author: Hayley L.
pros: Incredibly user friendly and intuitive for editing and creating the website, customer service has been exceptional with quick and helpful responses from the team for every query and integration with our booking platform was straightforward.
cons: The only thing I think I wanted but couldn't get was a slideshow style gallery as a block within the body of the webpage rather than the header. I have come up with a alternative solution but would still love this feature if it could be built in.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I wanted to change the font colour and size of just one of my sentences in a text block. I couldnt work it out. In the end, i contacted rocket spark, and they made a video and sent instructions to chane it. I had to go in and use hyper text and change the actual colour code.i couldnt change the size ar all. It would have been good if this was more akin to changing font in word or something like this. The service team were great, very helpful, but the product itself, I find clumsy.
author: Karen J.
pros: The service team are superb! They were really helpful and encouraging.
cons: Having to use hyper text code to change font colour.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I really love this platform and mostly being that it is a NZ business. I have been receiving more online orders than with my previous Wordpress site and will soon be building a second website for my art. It is super easy to add products, create categories and tags. Love it. Just a few functions could make the experience even better.
author: Santie C.
pros: It's easy to set up if you have a good understanding of Wordpress or similar templates. It's easier than wordpress and you don't have to download plugins. No spam through the contact which is great. Checkout is great with awesome gateway payments pages. Good notification on scheduled maintenance
cons: There is no function for adding a sale price to a product. Customers like to see what they are saving. Promo coupons are great but only for newsletters where you can notify customers. An item on sale function with sale price function would be great. It would be good if an item was sold to not show the price, or have that as an option. Customers cannot open an account and go back into their order. When you create a category it doesn't name the category in the browser but some product code. It would be great if you could have a function to change the breadcrumbs to look nicer. So if I click on Fine art prints and want to share the link on my social pages it looks like this [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] It would be nice if we could change the #category=15904 to fine-art-prints The only function where it does that is by creating a seperate page for each category and then inserting products into each page, but this is a very manual process. For Example I created a page for an exhibition titled small treasure and inserted products. The web link to this looks clean and readible: [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good to date. Support is good especially around launch time. Very patient :)
author: Scott M.
pros: Flexible and easy to operate AND an NZ product which I like supporting.
cons: I would like to see more flexibility with the blog stacks and a greater ability to categorise rather than just tag all the time...???

description: As above, it’s an all round great product. I love the community they’ve built for their partners as well, so we can all work together to help each other.
author: Amanda F.
pros: The ease of use, and ability to be able to offer beautiful functional websites to everyone. I also think the support is next level amazing, they go above and beyond to help, and work with us to build more options
cons: There is nothing that I don’t like, everything I need works!

author: Shannon C.
pros: Rocketspark has been easy to use from the start. I was able to quickly create 3 websites for clients and have recently created a new website for myself. The support team have been amazing and every question or request is taken seriously. The development team are continually come up with new features and improvements - it's always fun to have a play around with new abilities on the sites. And with integrations, Rocketspark have been very thoughtful in the best direct integrations to get up and running and continue to do so.
cons: I am struggling to think of negative aspects. It seems to do everything I need to on clients/my own websites.

author: Melanie C.
pros: I love how easy the software is to use, the built in templates and how you don't need to understand code to put together a beautiful website. The customer care team go above the call of duty to provide amazing customer service. I also love how I'm supporting a local NZ based company.
cons: I would love to see more template options as I haven't seen any new ones since I built my website. They are all totally customizable however. I just love seeing new things!

description: Overall, very satisfied with the product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Their customer service is really great - the how-to areas on Rocketspark for setting things up are easy to follow, and if you have a question, you can email them directly and expect a quick response
cons: There are a lot of features that require the more expensive package, but seem fairly straightforward
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent user experience and support makes this the best in class for designing and managing multiple websites.
author: John S.
pros: WYSIWYG editing and design makes the Rocketspark web design process as easy as using social media
cons: The ecommerce platform is not as comprehensive as the biggest platforms

description: My overall experience with Rocketspark has been excellent.
author: John C.
pros: Ease of use, Rocketspark's design system makes design accessible to novice designers.
cons: The lack of technical support over the weekends.

review_title: Super easy to use with a powerful suite of personalised design elements
description: We have two informational websites with Rocketspark and find them to be absolutely ideal with their easy to use controls, stylish layout and low pricing plans (additional features cost such as ecommerce but from what I've seen this is also very fairly priced). Excellent customer service, will generally respond within the hour and are always looking to improve their services and features, regularly putting through feature requests to the development team from requests made by us and going above and beyond to help!
author: Daniel S.
pros: The tools available to design all the buttons, text boxes, photos and more make a powerful combination for creating unique and elegant websites. It becomes very easy to space things apart properly and not clutter the space while also making all parts cohesive, aesthetic and flow together. Integrations such as jotform puts so many additional tools at your fingertips to add more functionality to your website. Linking and copying stacks is ideal for making quick changes to the design of a lot of pages at once, otherwise this could turn into a very tedious task.
cons: The lack of animations, everything in the software is static, and while very stylish, does lag behind in the modern website scene. Just small animations for content and stacks loading in could be huge for the website, along with a collection of icons and clip art!

review_title: Overall our experience has been a positive one, easy to get started and great support when needed
description: We had our old website for 10 years, and it was no longer capable of doing many of the things we wanted to be able to do, to keep up with developments in online retail, and the direction we were wanting to head. In particular at the time of moving, our old website was not a secure site and could not be optimised for mobiles.... Both of these Rocket Spark offered.... and they were recommended and they were local :)
author: Linda B.
pros: Easy to follow templates, instructions, and readily available help made it easy to set up the website ourselves without needing to employ a designer or developer. Also the SEO information was really good too. We already knew a lot of this, but had worked long and hard to learn it, so it is great to see it provided. We like that Rocket Spark is a local company, are so available and prompt in replying to us when we contact them, and are constantly looking to develop and fine tune their software.
cons: The software covers all the basics for an online shop, but lacks some of the features offered by some other providers of online shopping sites. We have contacted Rocket Spark about a couple of these issues and potential additions to our website and have been assured they will be considering them for future development. Online sales data is collected and provided, but can inaccurate as sales figures are calculated based on orders being placed, not payment being received. This also means that if an order is refunded the figure cannot be removed for the total either. There is no method to keep track of sales figures for unpaid direct credit orders, or refunded orders, as the unpaid orders and abandoned baskets category does not capture these. There is also no ability to up-sell just prior or at check out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Extremely helpful.Any questions are answered promptly. Give you ideas,steps/links to improve .
description: Easy to use. Able to keep up with current trends. Can be changed at anytime with many options. Good checkout process.Direct links with social media , payment systems etc. Can be personalised.
author: Leanne S.
pros: Images are taken care of. Easy to manage. Good platform.Kept upto date. Good links with social media and trending ideas. Great value for money. NZ based.It was a perfect way to start a new website with their trial process.I was even fortunate enough to extend the trial until I was sure I was ready. Great expertise team to guide and help you with anything to do with this particular software.Easy to manage and use. Good selection of templates and you have the ability to change any part of the website admin at any time. Good checkout process which links to direct payment system. Great to have the editing and preview available.Links with SEO (and Google). Available search function which I did not have in my previous website. Ability to manage and design banners,slides ,pages,
cons: Perhaps an easier/clearer comments section on the checkout process as customers don't see it and email me their preferences/messages for cards etc. Currently I get them to place any extra information in the shipping information box near checkout.This is mentioned on my website but they still don't see it!.

description: Really good. Lovely and professional people with a great product.
author: pip F.
pros: I like the modern template designs and the fast and helpful support always available
cons: Sometimes the guides don't have the answer I want so I have to message them direct

description: Very good and support staff are excellent
author: Brendan H.
pros: Simply easy to build an online store especially if one only has a limited number of products - Most desired features are present and integrations work very well
cons: Would like to see Shipping options improved e.g. shipping cost per product - Shipping based on product weight (s) by regions - what one does in one region affects all regions - I would prefer them to be independent

author: Gary W.
pros: My queries were responded to quite quickly and the response was in depth but was then followed up by another team member with more information.
cons: The quick responses and follow up support. It shows that more than one person looked at my account which by having more brains working on my products. Love it.

description: It enables me to curate a coherent social media footprint. In truth it's not the major driver. That's insta. But for impression management it's important.
author: Clive G.
pros: It's a useable interface for an amateur such as myself. I use very little of its functionality because I simply don't have the time to explore and learn
cons: To me it's the opposite of }national and intuitive - but that's really about me, not th software. I'm not qualified to provide a forensic review

description: I'm finding this software is assisting me to learn more about how customers can respond to websites, and in turn this is assisting me to become a better website designer. This is via the support setup, and the content they have online to educate users.
author: Lisa R.
pros: Rocketspark uses a 'layering stack system' for constructing websites which I'm finding super easy to use. This system really helps you to create a modern designed site. They also have a great selection of app integrations that can assist with a sites marketing.
cons: I'm still getting familiar with this platform - haven't found anything that's not responding as I'd expect yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: 10/10- I really don't have a hard time using this, and it has improved the look and feel of my work!
author: Cameron Z.
pros: NZ run, easy to use, simple in design, Customer service is amazing
cons: Some missing functionality but can be expected with new software, I know it will improve drastically over time, but still love it

description: We are a tiny drop of a tourism business in the huge ocean, yet we constantly get comments and compliments about our website from clients. Most of them think we are a much bigger company than we are thanks to the highly visual and engaging design! The Rocketspark support team is incredible. I can't rave highly enough with their response rate and how they go the extra mile to help me out. I've recommended them to friends and family who need a website for their businesses, and I'll continue to recommend them!
author: Kylie R.
pros: I love how easy the Rocketspark website platform is, in both building the site and updating content and design. The standard features are slick and custom development is very reasonably priced. The support team is second to none, I am so impressed with how fast and helpful they are.
cons: There's nothing I can think of - it's all great!

description: Amazing from mid night support to fixing my errors I was never made to feel like an idiot. They also took on all my product suggestions and the look of my website is ten fold than it was!
author: Stuart R.
pros: Your not just a number like the big American players. At Rocketspark I felt like I actually got support as if I was a big customer and the servers they host our website on is night and day compared to Go Daddy. The looks and adjustments are so much easier to do aswell that it will actually save my thousands.
cons: Haven't found anything yet. Few small improvements but linking Jotform to the website it solved it easy enough.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Why I like Rocketspark website software
description: No problems at all in a now close to three years.
author: Collyn R.
pros: It works and is relatively easy for non-computer literates to install and use
cons: There is nothing I really dislike about it.

description: Great. Love it.
author: Petra R.
pros: Ease of use, so many blogs and helpful information so easy to problem solve. Not over complicated
cons: More features would be nice, and the ability to have more layout options outside the standard. But still great.

description: When I was in absolute despair re website companies not living up to their names, their broken promises, and in one companies instance blatant lies!, it was like finding "gold" upon discovering Rocketspark. They will tell it like it is, deliver each and every time to my constant queries, and are oh so patient to boot. I won't be going anywhere else, just regret not finding this company earlier in the piece!
author: Catherine B.
pros: Overall - an absolute pleasure to deal with - Rocketspark team are real people with fantastic, helpful, knowledgeable advice.
cons: I have no problems or complaints wish is so refreshing!
